description: Recto: Brief letter/petition from a person in dire straits suffering from illness and lack of clothing, and unable to buy anything to eat for the upcoming holiday. Dating: likely 13th or 14th century (paleographic dating). Same scribe as T-S 8Ja1.2 (PGPID 7729). (Information in part from Goitein's index card.)
tags: illness letter 969-1517, illness: poverty, illness: marad, Appeal, Illness
